title: U.S. Intelligence Saw No Change in Iran’s Missile Capabilities Before War
summary_full: On Wednesday, the director of national intelligence and C.I.A. director contradicted one of the justifications the Trump administration had given for its attacks on Iran.
summary_public: On Wednesday, the director of national intelligence and C.I.A. director contradicted one of the justifications the Trump administration had given for its attacks on Iran.

IR.label: neutral
